mapper.insert:
insert into a_asset_flow (type, uid, scene, symbol, ymd, balance, frozen, memo, create_at) values
( #{item.type}, #{item.uid}, #{item.scene}, #{item.symbol}, #{item.ymd}, #{item.balance}, #{item.frozen}, #{item.memo}, #{item.createAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT symbol, scene, SUM(balance) amount FROM a_asset_flow WHERE ymd = #{yest} AND `TYPE` = 0 and refunded = 0 GROUP BY symbol, scene
